blocks.text:
To: Joseph Wallace
Cc: Jason Torres, Mary Parker

We are about a month into the integration work for {{fact:f:E-2009-003.client}}, and I wanted to give you a short status before the working session. Mary Parker has reconciled the headcount and reporting files from both legacy companies into a single view, and Jason Torres and I have started mapping the functions that now sit in duplicate. None of this is a conclusion yet; we are still assembling the picture.

Two items on your side are holding up the cost baseline. We still need the management accounts for the acquired company at the level of detail we already have for the Carroll, Merritt and Williams side, and we need a name for whoever can answer questions about how those accounts are kept. Some of the line-item groupings do not line up between the two companies, so a person we can put those questions to matters as much as the file itself. If you can point us to that person, a short call with them this week would keep us on schedule.

Separately, could you confirm the working session is still good for next week? We would like an hour with your finance staff while the reconciliation is fresh, and it would help if the person who owns the acquired-company accounts could join for part of it.
